# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default # Or the specific namespace where your services run
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service # Apply this policy to services labeled 'app: my-service'
      # You can add more specific labels here to narrow down the services
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service-account # Allow from frontend service account
              - cluster.local/ns/backend/sa/internal-worker-sa # Allow from an internal worker service account
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"] # Allow GET and POST methods
            paths: ["/api/v1/data*", "/api/v2/items"] # Allow paths starting with /api/v1/data or exactly /api/v2/items
      action: ALLOW
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prom-grafana-sa # Allow from monitoring service account
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET"] # Allow only GET method
            paths: ["/metrics", "/health"] # Allow access to metrics and health endpoints
      action: ALLOW
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-dashboard-sa # Allow from admin dashboard service account
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["PUT", "DELETE"] # Allow PUT and DELETE methods
            paths: ["/admin/config/*"] # Allow paths under /admin/config
      action: ALLOW
